docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY LO, ROBIN AS TO DEFENDANT ONG, TOMMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-17-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-17-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ROBIN LO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TOMMY ONG IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LO, ROBIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ONG, TOMMY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
